summary: Bad matrix recording plagued by flanging and out‑of‑phase sound; no musical highlights noted.
review: The sole review criticizes this matrix source as sounding flanged and out of phase, making the audio difficult to enjoy. No comments are made about the performance itself, so any assessment of the show’s musical quality is unavailable.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one low‑star review focusing on severe recording problems; no positive information about the performance to offset the poor audio.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as flanged, out of phase, and generally bad matrix mix.
